title: Mega Alakazam Battle Guide
summary: A top-tier [Psychic] special [sweeper] with 175 SpA and 150 Speed. [trace] copies oppo[sing] abilities for situational utility, and [nasty-plot] pushes the damage ceiling into OHKO range against most of the metagame.
strengths: 175 SpA and 150 Speed put it at the top of the Speed and damage tier
[trace] copies oppo[sing] abilities for free utility

recommendedMoves.reason: Main [Psychic] STAB with accuracy and reliability

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternatives

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Alakazam is a top-tier [Psychic] special [sweeper] defined by 175 SpA, 150 Speed, and [trace]. The Speed and damage tier is about as high as any [sweeper] in the metagame gets, and [trace] lets Mega Alakazam copy oppo[sing] abilities for free situational utility. In Champions, it is the dedicated fast special cleaner that closes matches after a [nasty-plot] turn.

## Strengths
175 SpA with [timid] nature produces the highest realistic damage ceiling in the fast special attacker pool. Speed 150 sits above every unboosted threat and most scarfed ones, so Mega Alakazam dictates the Speed tier. [trace] copies useful abilities like [levitate], in[timid]ate, and [flash-fire] on entry, turning switch-ins into matchup advantages. [nasty-plot] is the key button — one use brings [psychic], [focus-blast], and [shadow-ball] into guaranteed OHKO ranges.

## Weaknesses & Answers
55/65/105 bulk is still extremely fragile. Defense 65 is a minor improvement over the base form, but any neutral priority or cove[rage] move can still KO. [Dark], [Ghost], and [Bug] weaknesses are unchanged, and the pre-Mega turn runs synchronize or inner-focus instead of [trace], which means indirect damage can still chip through the first turn. Always Mega Evolve into a predicted switch, not into a revealed attack.

## Recommended Moveset
[psychic] is the locked main STAB because accuracy matters when every hit needs to land. [focus-blast] handles [Dark], [Steel], and [Normal] walls that would wall the STAB outright. [shadow-ball] covers [Ghost] and [psychic] mirrors. [nasty-plot] is the last slot and the win condition — without it, Mega Alakazam is a fast attacker with no damage ceiling ramp. A [psyshock] variant exists to punish special walls but sacrifices the [psychic] accuracy.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[alakazite] is the only item because the Mega Stone is mandatory. Ability becomes [trace] automatically after evolution. Tera [psychic] maxes STAB damage for the cleanest sweep, while Tera [Fairy] flips the [Dark] and [Dragon] weaknesses defensively for setup survivability. The defensive Tera is usually preferred because the offense is already overflowing.

## Teammates & Synergy
Mega Alakazam needs one guaranteed setup turn, so pair it with [fake-out] leads or pivot lines that force oppo[sing] switches. A [Fairy] or [Steel] partner covers the [Dark] and [Ghost] weaknesses, and a priority [block]er — [taunt] or [prankster] — shuts down [revenge] killers. Hazard removal is also important because the pre-Mega turn lacks [magic-guard].

## Play Patterns
Mega Evolve into a predicted switch, [nasty-plot] on the free turn, then open with the appropriate STAB or cove[rage] move. Save Tera for a telegraphed [Dark] or [Ghost] attack, and always play a[round] priority moves — the only way Mega Alakazam falls is to a priority [revenge] kill after setup.
